projectDescription: A premium single-page online bookstore with a luxury dark navy, gold, and white theme, featuring a browsable catalog of 24 books, shopping cart, wishlist, search and filters, and a smooth animated user experience — all powered by HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap 5, and Vanilla JavaScript.
keyFeatures: Hero banner with typing effect, floating books, particle background, and counters
24-book catalog with images, title, author, category, price, star ratings, and badges
Add to Cart, Wishlist, and Quick View for every book
Search, filter by category, and sort by price/rating/title
LocalStorage-backed shopping cart with quantity controls, sidebar, and checkout
Glassmorphism UI cards and premium dark navy / gold / white theme
AOS scroll animations, Animate.css effects, and smooth scrolling
Loading screen, back-to-top button, scroll progress bar, and custom scrollbar
SEO meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, and lazy-loaded images
Responsive layout across mobile, tablet, and desktop
publicApiSurface: addToCart(bookId) — adds a book to the LocalStorage cart
removeFromCart(bookId) — removes a book from the cart
updateQuantity(bookId, delta) — increments or decrements cart item quantity
toggleWishlist(bookId) — adds or removes a book from the wishlist
openQuickView(bookId) — opens the Quick View modal for a book
searchBooks(query) — filters the displayed catalog by title or author
filterByCategory(category) — filters the catalog by genre/category
sortBooks(criterion) — sorts the catalog by price, rating, or title
validateLoginForm() — validates email and password fields in the login modal
validateContactForm() — validates name, email, and message fields in the contact form
renderCart() — re-renders the cart sidebar with current LocalStorage state
showCheckoutAlert() — displays the SweetAlert2 checkout confirmation
